title: Transportation Vehicle, Equipment and Systems Inspectors, Except Aviation
description: Inspect and monitor transportation equipment, vehicles, or systems to ensure compliance with regulations and safety standards.

tasks.text: Inspect vehicles or other equipment for evidence of abuse, damage, or mechanical malfunction.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Inspect vehicles or equipment to ensure compliance with rules, standards, or regulations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Inspect repairs to transportation vehicles or equipment to ensure that repair work was performed properly.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Identify modifications to engines, fuel systems, emissions control equipment, or other vehicle systems to determine the impact of modifications on inspection procedures or conclusions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Conduct remote inspections of motor vehicles, using handheld controllers and remotely directed vehicle inspection devices.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare reports on investigations or inspections and actions taken.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Issue notices and recommend corrective actions when infractions or problems are found.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct visual inspections of emission control equipment and smoke emitted from gasoline or diesel vehicles.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Conduct vehicle or transportation equipment tests, using diagnostic equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Investigate incidents or violations, such as delays, accidents, and equipment failures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review commercial vehicle logs, shipping papers, or driver and equipment records to detect any problems or to ensure compliance with regulations.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Attach onboard diagnostics (OBD) scanner cables to vehicles to conduct emissions inspections.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.
Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Examine carrier operating rules, employee qualification guidelines, or carrier training and testing programs for compliance with regulations or safety standards.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
